scripts.test:mobile: npm --prefix packages/chart test && npm --prefix packages/react-chart-ui test
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm --prefix packages/chart run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/react-chart-ui run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/docs run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:stage1: npm run typecheck:packages && npm --prefix packages/chart run build:types && npm --prefix packages/react-chart-ui run build:types && npm run check:ts-suppressions
